response.justification: Candidate has strong fullstack skills matching most required technologies (TypeScript, React, Node.js, REST, AWS, Kubernetes) and bonus AI/LLM experience, but is dramatically overqualified at Staff/Senior level for a Junior/Mid role. High risk of compensation mismatch, retention issues, and dissatisfaction with entry-level scope. Worth a short screening call to gauge genuine interest and salary alignment before committing to a full interview loop.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js background with 10+ years fullstack experience
Bonus AI/LLM and Kubernetes/AWS experience beyond nice-to-haves
concerns: Severely overqualified (Staff/Senior) for a Junior/Mid IC role — retention and compensation risk
Only basic German, which may matter for German renovation/energy industry clients
Resume shows MongoDB/MySQL but no explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience
